name: Mrs Fields' Orange Chocolate Chunk Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, salt, and orange peel. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend sugars with an electric mixer at medium speed until combined.
4. Add butter and beat to form a grainy paste, scraping sides of the bowl as needed.
5. Add eggs and orange extract, and beat at medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Add the flour mixture and chopped chocolate. Blend on low speed just until mixed.
7. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets, 1 1/2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 22-24 minutes until cookies are slightly brown along the edges.
9. Transfer cookies immediately to a cool surface.
